overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a scenic river valley. The character descends a grassy hillside, crosses paths with a mounted rider, and continues along a riverside trail with rocky cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail descending to river valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a grassy trail toward a wide river valley with rocky banks

entered.detail: steep grassy slope with scattered rocks and tall grass
narrow winding dirt path cutting through the grass
wide shallow river with rocky banks and scattered boulders
dense evergreen forest covering the distant hills and mountains
large gray boulders scattered throughout the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a grassy hillside trail toward a scenic river valley. The landscape features a wide river with rocky banks, surrounded by dense pine forests in the distance under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: river valley floor with crossing trail

events.description: rider on horseback emerges from the left side of the valley and approaches the trail
horse and rider gallop across the path from left to right in front of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a mounted rider crosses the path ahead

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse galloping across the path from left to right

entered.detail: tall rock formation becoming visible on the right side of the valley

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the river valley floor, a rider on horseback suddenly appears from the left and gallops across the path. The terrain shifts to reveal rocky cliffs rising on the right side while the river flows on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail with tall rocky cliffs on right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverside trail with steep rock faces rising on the right and the river visible on the left

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall with sparse vegetation towering over the trail
leafless dead tree standing alone near the riverbank ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the riverside trail, now flanked by a massive rocky cliff face on the right that partially blocks the sky. The grassy hills give way to a more rugged terrain with a distinctive dead tree visible ahead near the riverbank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a lush, open hillside into a rugged river valley flanked by towering cliffs. It begins with the character walking down a grassy trail toward a wide river and distant pine forests under a bright blue sky. As the character reaches the valley floor, a rider on horseback suddenly gallops across the path from the left, shifting the perspective to reveal rocky cliffs rising on the right. The scene then transitions along the riverside trail, where the open landscape gives way to a massive, looming cliff face that partially blocks the sky. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rugged, leading the camera toward a distinctive dead tree standing near the riverbank.
